title: U.S. stock futures fall, oil rises ahead of a busy week for Wall Street
summary: U.S. stock-index futures declined Sunday as oil prices rose, setting up a pivotal trading week following recent S&P 500 and Nasdaq records. Market momentum appears vulnerable ahead of major earnings and economic events.
content: U.S. stock-index futures dropped on Sunday as oil prices rose, ahead of a key week for Wall Street following record highs for the S&P 500 and the tech-heavy Nasdaq.

zh.title: 美国股指期货下跌，油价上升，华尔街迎来繁忙一周
zh.summary: 随着油价上涨，美国股指期货周日下跌，为华尔街的关键交易周拉开帷幕，此前标普500和纳斯达克创历史新高。在主要财报和经济事件面前，市场动能显得岌岌可危。

title: How climate change threatens the economic backbone of the Pacific
summary: Rising ocean temperatures could force tuna populations away from Pacific Island regions, threatening a critical food and economic resource. This climate-driven shift would devastate communities dependent on tuna fishing and exports.
content: Tuna populations around the Pacific Islands could move away as ocean temperatures increase.

zh.title: 气候变化如何威胁太平洋的经济支柱
zh.summary: 海洋温度上升可能会将金枪鱼种群赶离太平洋岛屿地区，威胁到关键的食物和经济资源。这种由气候驱动的转变将对依赖金枪鱼捕捞和出口的社区造成毁灭性影响。

title: Everything we know about Cole Allen, the D.C. correspondents dinner shooter
summary: Cole Allen, a guest at the Washington Hilton where the White House Correspondents' Dinner was held, checked in Friday before the shooting. Investigators are working to determine motives and details surrounding the incident.
content: Allen was a guest at the Washington Hilton, where the dinner was held, and officials said he checked in on Friday.

zh.title: 我们所了解的DC记者晚宴枪击事件枪手科尔·艾伦的一切
zh.summary: 科尔·艾伦是华盛顿希尔顿酒店的客人，该酒店举办了白宫记者晚宴，他在枪击事件前的周五办理入住。调查人员正在努力确定事件的动机和细节。

title: Stock futures fall as Iran peace talks stall, oil rises: Live updates
summary: Deteriorating U.S.-Iran negotiations and rising oil prices triggered futures market declines heading into a critical week for equities. Geopolitical tension remains a key risk factor as markets await major corporate earnings.
content: Heightened geopolitical tensions are front and center heading into a pivotal week for stocks.

title: The Chinese sports brand taking on Nike and Adidas
summary: Anta, now among the world's largest sportswear companies, has challenged Nike and Adidas using strategies common to Chinese tech giants. The company's growth illustrates China's competitive advantage in manufacturing and retail scale.
content: Now one of the biggest sportswear firms, Anta's rise follows a playbook adopted by many Chinese giants.

title: Wall Street’s Super Bowl Wednesday: Alphabet, Amazon, Microsoft and Meta report along with Powell’s last Fed meeting
summary: Wednesday marks a historic market event with Alphabet, Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta reporting earnings simultaneously alongside Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's final press conference. This convergence could significantly impact market sentiment and direction.
content: It’s a historic Wednesday for Wall Street as Alphabet, Amazon, Microsoft and Meta report alongside Jerome Powell’s final press conference

zh.title: 华尔街的超级碗周三：Alphabet、亚马逊、微软和Meta同时报告财报，伴随鲍威尔最后的美联储会议
zh.summary: 周三标志着一个历史性市场事件，Alphabet、亚马逊、微软和Meta同时报告财报，与美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的最后一次新闻发布会同时进行。这一巧合可能会对市场情绪和走向产生重大影响。

title: 'There's so much I want to give my daughter - poverty means I can't'
summary: Wales has the highest child poverty rate among UK nations at approximately one-third, limiting families' ability to provide basic opportunities. Personal stories illustrate the human cost and long-term impact of childhood poverty.
content: Around a third of Welsh children live in poverty, the highest among the four UK nations.

zh.title: "我想给女儿很多东西，但贫困阻止了我"
zh.summary: 威尔士的儿童贫困率在英国各国中最高，约为三分之一，限制了家庭为儿童提供基本机会的能力。个人故事说明了儿童贫困的人道成本和长期影响。

title: I will inherit my parents’ $1.5 million estate. Do I fire the adviser who charges a 3% fee?
summary: An inheritor questions whether to replace their parents' financial adviser when receiving a $1.5 million estate, citing mixed investment performance. Fee structure and adviser value become critical decisions during estate transitions.
content: “Some stocks have risen, but others have flopped.”

zh.title: 我将继承父母的150万美元遗产。我应该解雇收取3%费用的顾问吗？
zh.summary: 继承人在获得150万美元遗产时质疑是否应该更换父母的财务顾问，理由是投资表现参差不齐。在遗产交割期间，费用结构和顾问价值成为关键决策。

title: ‘The Lord has taken care of me’: I’m 74. I went from earning $14 an hour to retiring with $3.4 million. Here’s how I did it.
summary: A 74-year-old retired with $3.4 million despite earning just $14 per hour, demonstrating the power of consistent long-term wealth building. The story highlights how modest income combined with discipline can achieve substantial financial goals.
content: “I have always thought that I did not have any real talents or skills.”

zh.title: "上帝照顾了我"：我74岁，从每小时赚14美元退休到拥有340万美元。我是这样做的。
zh.summary: 一位74岁的退休者尽管每小时只赚14美元，但还是积累了340万美元，展示了持续长期财富积累的力量。这个故事突出了如何通过适度收入和纪律来实现重大财务目标。

title: I’m planning to retire at 60. Should I sell my house, rent and invest the $500,000?
summary: A retirement planning analysis explores whether selling a home and renting while investing $500,000 is a viable strategy for someone planning to retire at age 60. The approach suggests renting could improve monthly cash flow by approximately $1,300.
content: “Renting improves cash flow by about $1,300 a month.”

zh.title: 我计划在60岁退休。我应该卖掉房子、租房并投资50万美元吗？
zh.summary: 退休规划分析探讨了对于计划60岁退休的人来说，出售住房、租房并投资50万美元是否是可行策略。该方案表明租房可以将每月现金流改善约1,300美元。

title: Iran's top diplomat briefly returns to Pakistan but Trump says the sides can talk by phone
summary: Iran's foreign minister visited Pakistan as diplomats attempted to restart U.S.-Iran ceasefire talks, though Trump suggested phone negotiations as an alternative. The diplomatic efforts reflect ongoing tensions and possible openness to dialogue.
content: Iran's foreign minister briefly visited Islamabad again as Pakistani leaders scrambled to reignite ceasefire negotiations between Tehran and the U.S.

zh.title: 伊朗高级外交官短暂回到巴基斯坦，但特朗普表示双方可以通过电话谈话

title: ‘My child requires lifelong support’: I’m in my 40s with $330,000 for retirement. How can I make this last both our lifetimes?
summary: A parent in their 40s with $330,000 in retirement savings seeks guidance on making their portfolio sustain both their own retirement and their child's lifelong financial needs. The query highlights the challenge of planning for dependent care while managing long-term investment growth.
content: “The portfolio has grown, but I can’t help feeling that it hasn’t grown as much as it could have.”

zh.title: "我的孩子需要终身支持"：我40多岁，有33万美元的退休储蓄。如何让这笔钱支撑我们两个人的一生？

title: Sen. Thom Tillis drops opposition, says he’ll back Kevin Warsh’s Fed confirmation
summary: Senator Thom Tillis reversed his opposition to Kevin Warsh's Federal Reserve chair nomination after the Justice Department dropped its criminal case against outgoing Chair Jerome Powell. This political shift removes a significant obstacle to Warsh's confirmation.

summary: A Michael Jackson biopic achieved major box-office success, demonstrating his enduring fan base despite decades of child sexual abuse allegations. The film's performance underscores the separation many audiences maintain between artist and art.

title: ‘AI genuinely freaks me out’: Do I leave my $150,000 nonprofit job for a $215,000 data analytics position — with a 50-minute commute?

zh.title: "AI让我真的很害怕"：我要离开月薪15万美元的非营利工作，去做月薪21.5万美元的数据分析工作吗——还要通勤50分钟？

title: Cramer: Why all the money flowing to AI stocks is a problem — and how it can be fixed
summary: Cramer examines how excessive capital flowing into AI and data center-related stocks creates market imbalances while other sectors like pharma are neglected. The article proposes solutions to address this concentrated investment pattern.
content: Just as anything peripherally involved with the data center is blessed, anything even tangentially associated with pharma is a nightmare.

title: I’ve studied over 200 kids—parents who have the closest relationships with their adult kids never do 6 things

content: Every parent hopes their adult child will still want to call, still want to come home, and still choose to let them in. Child psychologist Reem Raouda, who has studied over 200 kids, shares what not to do if you want your kids to stay close with you later on in life.

zh.summary: 大科技股在4月份飙升，在美伊地缘政治紧张局势中呈现出引人注目的投资机会。该行业的强劲势头使本周对交易员和投资者尤为重要。尽管存在更广泛的经济不确定性，市场对科技公司的信心仍然保持强劲。

title: Higher prices could last for eight months after Iran war, minister says
summary: A government official warns that prices could remain elevated for up to eight months following a potential Iran conflict, reflecting concerns about supply chain disruptions. Authorities are actively monitoring inventory levels and developing contingency plans to mitigate economic impacts. The statement underscores the potential consumer price effects of geopolitical instability.
content: Officials are monitoring stock levels and planning for any potential disruptions to the supply chain.

zh.title: 伊朗战争后物价可能持续上涨八个月，部长表示
zh.summary: 一位政府官员警告称，在可能发生伊朗冲突后，物价可能在长达八个月内保持高位，反映了对供应链中断的担忧。当局正在积极监测库存水平，并制定应急计划以减轻经济影响。该声明强调了地缘政治不稳定性对消费者物价的潜在影响。

title: Trump: Shooter at White House press dinner had multiple weapons, one officer shot
summary: A shooting incident occurred at a White House press dinner where President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump were present. The shooter was armed with multiple weapons and one officer was shot. Trump was quickly secured by Secret Service agents while attendees took cover.
content: Trump, seated next to first lady Melania Trump, was quickly surrounded by Secret Service agents, while many attendees ducked under their tables.

zh.title: 特朗普：白宫新闻晚宴枪手持多件武器，一名警官被击中
zh.summary: 白宫新闻晚宴发生枪击事件，特朗普总统和第一夫人梅拉尼亚·特朗普出席。枪手携带多件武器，一名警官被击中。特朗普迅速得到特勤局人员保护，与会者就地躲避。
